title: Build shot-types/ menu in video-11 Remotion project
description: Stub one Remotion component per shot type from the agreed shot vocabulary (talking-head-full/pip, terminal-tape, code-reveal, diagram-build, file-tree, diff, browser-playback, zoom-punch, notification, metric-ticker, side-by-side). Target: video-11-production-pipeline/03-remotion/src/shot-types/. Goal: a closed menu the video composer can pick from per segment, so production becomes table-driven. First user is video-11 V2 script (30 segments, 9 REC CANDIDATEs already flagged).
notes: Codex review of b0d48a9: branch healthy, npx tsc --noEmit passes, remotion still renders ShotDemo successfully, ShotDemo + 13-shot menu all registered. One issue caught: package.json had broken render script pointing to nonexistent Main composition + a duplicate build script. Fixed in ded95c3 — kept only start (preview) and demo (render ShotDemo); render script returns when Main is wired.

value: For Jarvis/Dr. Terry Byrd YouTube video dialogue, use collective voice by default: we/our/ours instead of I/my/mine. The only planned first-person singular exception is the opening avatar self-introduction, e.g. 'I am the avatar for Dr. Terry Byrd...' CTAs should appear as their own pre-closing segment before the final full-screen talking-head close.
